mapper.select: SELECT thc.*, twi.workplace_nm, COUNT(*) OVER ( PARTITION BY thc.workplace_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(thc.checklist_dt, 'YYYYMMDD')) ) AS result_cnt FROM esg.tb_hazmat_checklist thc LEFT JOIN esg.tb_workplace_info twi ON twi.workplace_id = thc.workplace_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND thc.comp_id = #{compId} AND thc.write_year = #{writeYear} GROUP BY thc.write_year, thc.doc_type, thc.doc_no, thc.comp_id, thc.workplace_id, thc.checklist_dt, thc.checklist_start,thc.checklist_end,thc.use_yn,thc.created_at,thc.created_by,thc.updated_at,thc.updated_by, twi.workplace_nm ORDER BY thc.use_yn DESC, thc.workplace_id, thc.checklist_dt DESC

SELECT thcd.*, tdhcd.checklist_item_nm, tdhc.checklist_nm, tdhc.checklist_id FROM esg.tb_hazmat_checklist_detail thcd INNER JOIN esg.tb_dataset_hazmat_checklist_detail tdhcd ON tdhcd.checklist_item_id = thcd.checklist_item_id INNER JOIN esg.tb_dataset_hazmat_checklist tdhc ON tdhc.checklist_id = tdhcd.checklist_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND thcd.write_year = #{writeYear} AND thcd.doc_no = #{docNo} AND thcd.doc_type = #{docType} ORDER BY thcd.doc_seq

SELECT tmi.* , twm.workplace_id as workplace_id , twi.workplace_nm as workplace_nm FROM esg.tb_workplace_map twm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_msds_info tmi on tmi.msds_id = twm.target_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_workplace_info twi on twi.workplace_id = twm.workplace_id WHERE 1=1 AND twm.workplace_id = #{workplaceId} AND twm.target_type = 'msds' AND twm.use_yn = 'Y' AND tmi.use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_hazmat_checklist WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_hazmat_checklist ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, workplace_id, checklist_dt, checklist_start, checklist_end, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{workplaceId}, #{checklistDt}, #{checklistStart}, #{checklistEnd}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_hazmat_checklist_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_hazmat_checklist_detail ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, checklist_item_id, acceptable_yn, non_compliant_yn, require_check_yn, checklist_action, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{checklistItemId}, #{acceptableYn}, #{nonCompliantYn}, #{requireCheckYn}, #{checklistAction}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT #{writeYear} as write_year, thcd.doc_type, #{docNo} as doc_no, NULL as doc_seq, thcd.checklist_item_id, tdhcd.checklist_item_nm, tdhc.checklist_nm, 'N' as acceptable_yn, 'N' as non_compliant_yn, 'N' as require_check_yn, NULL as checklist_action FROM esg.tb_hazmat_checklist thc LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hazmat_checklist_detail thcd ON thc.write_year = thcd.write_year AND thc.doc_no = thcd.doc_no AND thc.doc_type = thcd.doc_type INNER JOIN esg.tb_dataset_hazmat_checklist_detail tdhcd ON tdhcd.checklist_item_id = thcd.checklist_item_id INNER JOIN esg.tb_dataset_hazmat_checklist tdhc ON tdhc.checklist_id = tdhcd.checklist_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND thcd.doc_type = #{docType} AND thc.workplace_id = #{searchText} AND thc.checklist_dt = ( SELECT MAX(checklist_dt) FROM esg.tb_hazmat_checklist WHERE 1 = 1 AND doc_type = #{docType} AND workplace_id = #{searchText} );
SELECT * FROM esg.tb_dataset_hazmat_checklist WHERE 1 = 1 AND comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY ord_seq, checklist_id
mapper.insert:
WITH current_date_info AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS today, COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(checklist_id, 9, 4)::INTEGER), 0) AS max_sequence FROM esg.tb_dataset_hazmat_checklist WHERE SUBSTRING(checklist_id, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT today || CASE WHEN max_sequence = 0 THEN '0001' ELSE CASE WHEN max_sequence < 9999 THEN LPAD((max_sequence + 1)::TEXT, 4, '0') ELSE '0001' -- 시퀀스가 9999에 도달하면 재시작 END END AS checklistId FROM current_date_info;
INSERT INTO esg.tb_dataset_hazmat_checklist ( comp_id, checklist_id, checklist_nm, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{checklistId}, #{checklistNm}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

WITH current_date_info AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS today, COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(checklist_item_id, 9, 4)::INTEGER), 0) AS max_sequence FROM esg.tb_dataset_hazmat_checklist_detail WHERE SUBSTRING(checklist_item_id, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT today || CASE WHEN max_sequence = 0 THEN '0001' ELSE CASE WHEN max_sequence < 9999 THEN LPAD((max_sequence + 1)::TEXT, 4, '0') ELSE '0001' -- 시퀀스가 9999에 도달하면 재시작 END END AS checklistItemId FROM current_date_info;
INSERT INTO esg.tb_dataset_hazmat_checklist_detail ( comp_id, checklist_id, checklist_item_id, checklist_item_nm, use_yn, ord_seq, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{checklistId}, #{checklistItemId}, #{checklistItemNm}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dataset.tb_dataset_hazmat_checklist WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY ord_seq
SELECT * FROM dataset.tb_dataset_hazmat_checklist_detail WHERE 1 = 1 AND checklist_id = #{checklistId} ORDER BY ord_seq
